response.justification: The candidate lacks the mandatory 5–10 years of professional C++ development experience on Windows platforms, which is a core requirement for this role. While they have C++ experience from National Instruments (2014–2015), it is insufficient in both duration and domain relevance. Their background is heavily skewed toward JavaScript, TypeScript, Node.js, and other languages, with no demonstrated fixed-income, capital markets, or investment banking domain expertise.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship principles (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Experience with low-latency systems and high-performance databases (Dlang, Micro-services)
Diverse technical stack and problem-solving skills across multiple domains
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience on Windows platforms (only ~1 year, not 5–10 years)
No domain expertise in Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking
Lacks required SQL Server/Oracle experience (only mentions generic SQL)
